title: Nexus WorldKbPatchEntityRequest
description: Request body for POST /v1/local/worlds/{world_id}/kb/patch-entity (V1.73). Edits an entity (KeyBlock) title/body/aliases/block_type with per-row OCC on kb_key_blocks.revision.

entity_id.description: KeyBlock id from the URL world scope. Authoritative identifier.

expected_version.description: Per-row version observed by the client on the last canonical read (kb_key_blocks.revision, NULL normalized to 0).

patch.description: Fields to update. At least one property must be provided.
